text_blocks.speaker: narration
text_blocks.text: Saturday morning, Nova Tutinia. A seemingly simple mission: pick up diapers, baby food, and two quick things.

text_blocks.speaker: favilla
text_blocks.text: Walk in, grab four things, walk out. Ten minutes flat.

text_blocks.speaker: sparkle_ale
text_blocks.text: Aaaah!

text_blocks.speaker: narration
text_blocks.text: But every hero mom knows that at the supermarket, fate is listening... and laughing.

text_blocks.speaker: narration
text_blocks.text: Favilla grabs a cart and settles Ale into the front seat. It all looks under control.

text_blocks.speaker: favilla
text_blocks.text: Shopping list, focus mode. Ten minutes. Maybe twelve.

text_blocks.speaker: narration
text_blocks.text: While Favilla scrolls the list on her phone, Sparkle Ale watches the battlefield with the eyes of a chaos genius.

text_blocks.speaker: sparkle_ale
text_blocks.text: Heh.

text_blocks.speaker: narration
text_blocks.text: With materials scavenged from who knows where, Ale builds a tiny handmade peashooter, worthy of a miniature supervillain.

text_blocks.speaker: favilla
text_blocks.text: Diapers, milk, cookies, wipes... it's all going far too well.

text_blocks.speaker: narration
text_blocks.text: Favilla doesn't notice that from the seat the first silent shot is fired at one of the cart's wheels.

text_blocks.speaker: sparkle_ale
text_blocks.text: Pff!

text_blocks.speaker: narration
text_blocks.text: One shot. Two shots. Three shots. Ale takes aim like a pro saboteur in training.

text_blocks.speaker: sparkle_ale
text_blocks.text: Pff! Pff!

text_blocks.speaker: favilla
text_blocks.text: Why can I hear catastrophe coming, but I can't see it yet?

text_blocks.speaker: narration
text_blocks.text: Halfway through the trip, the perfect shot hits the wheel. The cart wobbles. Swerving, it picks a path of its own.

text_blocks.speaker: narration
text_blocks.text: The cart of destiny is hijacked like a runaway missile straight into a center aisle shelf.

text_blocks.speaker: favilla
text_blocks.text: Ale? ...Ale.

text_blocks.speaker: narration
text_blocks.text: Impact. Boxes, packs, bottles and cans tumble everywhere. In an instant the supermarket looks like a field of ruins.

text_blocks.speaker: favilla
text_blocks.text: No. No no no. Not this.

text_blocks.speaker: narration
text_blocks.text: And that's when Favilla stops being just a mom at the supermarket.

text_blocks.speaker: narration
text_blocks.text: A spark crosses her gaze. Her sweater comes alive with light. It's the call of the hero.

text_blocks.speaker: favilla_blaze
text_blocks.text: Emergency mode activated.

text_blocks.speaker: narration
text_blocks.text: Favilla transforms into Favilla Blaze.

text_blocks.speaker: narration
text_blocks.text: With superhuman speed, Favilla Blaze stands the shelf back up, snatches every product mid-fall and erases every trace of the disaster.

text_blocks.speaker: narration
text_blocks.text: In a few seconds everything is back in its perfect place. Nobody notices a thing.

text_blocks.speaker: favilla_blaze
text_blocks.text: Chaos neutralized. Main witness: a baby with a peashooter.

text_blocks.speaker: narration
text_blocks.text: A moment later, the energy fades. Favilla goes back to normal, takes the cart and heads for the checkout as if nothing happened.

text_blocks.speaker: narration
text_blocks.text: Mission complete. Bags full. Energy almost out. Dignity down to 12%.

text_blocks.speaker: favilla
text_blocks.text: We're alive. We've got everything. And nobody got left in the cookie aisle.

text_blocks.speaker: favilla
text_blocks.text: Next time I order online.

text_blocks.speaker: narration
text_blocks.text: But in every hero's heart there's one inevitable truth: even everyday chaos can become legend.

text_blocks.speaker: sparkle_ale
text_blocks.text: Ahhhh!
